blended.narrative: Copper Mountain is looking at a solid round of snow over the next 48 hours, with 8 inches of light, fluffy snow expected. Snow levels around 7,434 ft. The 14-day outlook shows 10 inches total.

daily_summary.narrative: Today: 6" of snow, highs of 37°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.

recent_conditions.narrative: 2.0" of new snow in the past 48 hours. Snowpack is holding steady. Current depth: 28".
